turns.content:
You are hm-code-reviewer. Conduct a codebase-wide deep scan for latent concerns.

## Output target
.hivemind/planning/codebase-deep-scan-2026-06-04.md

## Scope (skim, do not full-read)

### A. Invariant violations
- 27-tool-key: verify exactly 27 tool keys in src/plugin.ts (look for `create*Tool` calls and inline pre-constructed tools)
- P20: verify package.json has no new deps added since P58.8 gap-fix (compare to last known state)
- AC#10: src/plugin.ts appendTuiPrompt has getManualOverrideState check FIRST (line ~940-947)
- AC#11: src/tools/tmux-copilot.ts forward-prompt has getManualOverrideState check FIRST (line ~263-278)
- BATS slot uniqueness: verify slots 62-74 are all unique, no collision
- USER-PAIN-BACKLOG: verify .planning/USER-PAIN-BACKLOG.md exists with 4 symptoms (S1-S4)

### B. Latent bugs
- src/coordination/delegation/manager-runtime.ts:244 (fire-and-forget sendPromptAsync) — pre-send validation, error handling
- src/coordination/delegation/coordinator.ts:200 (subscribe wiring) — leak prevention, error handling
- src/features/session-tracker/index.ts (child event subscription) — buffer bounds, ring buffer overflow
- src/features/tmux/session-manager.ts:startPolling — backoff logic, leak prevention on shutdown
- src/features/tmux/tmux-multiplexer.ts:capturePaneContent — content size cap, error handling
- src/tools/tmux-copilot.ts:peek action — permission gate (user-tier allowed?)
- src/tools/delegation/delegation-status.ts:peek action + progress action — Zod schema, action enum coverage

### C. Anti-patterns
- Console.log left in src/ (search for `console.log(`, `console.error(`, `process.stderr.write`)
- any types (search for `: any`, `as any`, `<any>`)
- TODO/FIXME/HACK comments without ticket refs (search for `TODO`, `FIXME`, `HACK`, `XXX`)
- Hardcoded paths (search for `.opencode/`, `.hivemind/`, `src/`, `tests/` string literals)
- Synchronous fs operations (search for `readFileSync`, `writeFileSync`, `fs.readFileSync`)

### D. Test coverage gaps
- 4 BATS slots 71-74 — assert they test the right things
- AC#10/AC#11 BATS regression guards
- 27-tool-key invariant test at tests/integration/hook-registration.test.ts:86-103

### E. Documentation drift
- .planning/ROADMAP.md Symptom Coverage Matrix — populated correctly?
- .planning/STATE.md — last-updated date current?
- .planning/REQUIREMENTS.md — current requirements?
- 58-SPEC.md — final REQ count footer accurate?
- 58-PLAN-08-GAP-FIX.md — final commit count?

### F. META process changes
- .claude/get-shit-done/templates/spec.md:25-99 — User-Pain Coverage section present?
- .claude/get-shit-done/templates/verification.md — Human-Driven UAT section present?
- .planning/USER-PAIN-BACKLOG.md — 4 symptoms listed with statuses?

- DO NOT modify any source code, tests, or .opencode/
